description: Operator-facing alert definitions for always-on autopilot (artifact- and log-routable signals).

alerts.summary: Autonomy budget or rollout policy requires human intervention
signals: autopilot state or decision JSON: budget_state.human_escalation_required == true

alerts.summary: This controller repeatedly failed to acquire the lease for this tenant/repo scope
signals: decision artifacts skip_not_lease_holder with rising lease_denied_streak

alerts.summary: Repeated safe-recompile failures; may trip human_escalation_required when budget ceiling is hit
